Quality Education.reason: The course provides tertiary legal education (Target 4.3) and rigorously trains students in practical legal skills, such as document drafting and oral advocacy, directly preparing them for employment in the IP law sector (Target 4.4).

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course directly prepares students for specialized legal careers, contributing to decent job creation and entrepreneurship (Target 8.3). Special Study on Law of Intellectual Property (V)

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course is fundamentally about Intellectual Property law, which provides the legal framework essential for encouraging and protecting innovation, a core component of Targets 9.5 (enhancing scientific research, encouraging innovation) and 9.b (supporting domestic technology development, research and innovation).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course provides core training in legal processes, practical litigation skills, and understanding the court system (e.g., mock trials, civil litigation procedures), directly promoting the rule of law and ensuring access to justice (Target 16.3) within the intellectual property domain.
